title: JGZSunShineMod
description: This is a personally developed mod that adds many items and is about to release version 1.21-1.21.1! ! !这是一个个人开发的模组,增加了很多物品,且即将退出1.21-1.21.1版本的! ! !
body:
这款 mod 由 JGZ_YES 独立制作开发，为游戏增添了不少全新元素。其中包括多种独特的矿物，这些矿物不仅外观各异，还能用于打造后续的工具和装备；全新的工具系列，涵盖了挖掘、砍伐、战斗等不同用途，性能上与原版工具有所区别，能为玩家的探索和生存带来新的体验；多样化的盔甲，在提供防护的同时，也有着别具一格的造型设计；此外，还加入了实用的马铠，让玩家的坐骑也能得到有效的保护。​
需要说明的是，这是该 mod 的一代版本，目前包含的物品数量相对有限。但随着后续版本的更新，相信会有更多丰富有趣的内容逐步加入，为玩家带来持续的新鲜感。​

[反馈问题](https://qm.qq.com/q/t7S6sBNMYK)

[Wiki](https://wiki.shanwogou.cn/)

贴图:Besson(从他的GitHub:[GitHub Link](https://github.com/BeiShanair/) 搬运的贴图)

This mod is independently developed by JGZ_YES, adding many new elements to the game. It includes a variety of unique ores, which not only have different appearances but can also be used to forge subsequent tools and equipment; a new series of tools covering different purposes such as mining, chopping, and combat, with performance different from the original tools, which can bring new experiences to players' exploration and survival; a variety of armors, which not only provide protection but also have unique styling designs; in addition, practical horse armors are added to effectively protect players' mounts.​
It should be noted that this is the first version of the mod, and the number of items included is relatively limited. However, with the update of subsequent versions, it is believed that more rich and interesting content will be gradually added, bringing players a continuous sense of freshness.
